case_title: EARL MARTIN VS. RTRN INVESTMENT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT RTRN INVESTMENT, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVE PATEL--DIRECTOR OF MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RTRN INVESTMENT, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
